yt_title: Andrew Wilkinson on Jorge Paulo Lemann, Local News, and Health Ideas

business_ideas.idea: Pregnancy and maternal health optimization business like Hims or Roman
Medical advocate or health manager for navigating complex health issues
Local news business model (Capital Daily/Overstory) for cities
Passport photo booth business in high-traffic locations

predictions.text: Health optimization during pregnancy will become a multi-billion market
Local news will consolidate through companies like Capital Daily across Canada
Simple location-based businesses remain highly profitable long-term
